zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Weare於1583年出生在英國維爾爾布洛肯包洛時，他的父親Thomas Weare44歲，母親Joane Bayley41歲。他於1626年與Rebecca Waite在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1653年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年70歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Weare于1583年出生在英国維爾爾布洛肯包洛时，他的父亲Thomas Weare44岁，母亲Joane Bayley41岁。他于1626年与Rebecca Waite在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾哈爾費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1653年10月12日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利享年70岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可紐波利。

nameMeanings.name: Weare
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Wear   or   Ware  .

variants.name: Wear
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by the Wear river in northeastern England. The river name is ancient, occuring in the form Vedra in Ptolemy's Geographia; it is probably from a Celtic word meaning ‘water’.
topographic name for someone who lived near a dam or weir, a variant of Ware 1, or a habitational name from a place called Weare, in Devon and Somerset, from Old English wær, wer ‘weir’.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Weare was born in 1583, in Brokenborough, Wiltshire, England, his father, Thomas Weare, was 44 and his mother, Joane Bayley, was 41. He married Rebecca Waite in 1626, in Charfield, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 12 October 1653, in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Weare est né en 1583, à Brokenborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Weare, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Joane Bayley, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Rebecca Waite en 1626, à Charfield, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1653, à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Weareが1583年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアブロケンボロウで生まれた時，父Thomas Weareは44歳，母Joane Bayleyは41歳であった。1626年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチャーフィールドでRebecca Waiteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1653年10月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーで70歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスニューブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이
ko.Newbury, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 뉴버이
ko.lifeSummary: Peter Weare(이)가 1583년 영국 윌츠히르 브로켄버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Weare(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Joane Bayley(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1626년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 처필드에서 Rebecca Waite(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1653년 10월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 뉴버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Weare nasceu em 1583, em Brokenborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Weare, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Joane Bayley, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Rebecca Waite em 1626, em Charfield, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1653, em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Newbury, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Weare родился в 1583 г. в местности брокенбороую, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Weare было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Joane Bayley, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Rebecca Waite в 1626 г. в местности чарфиелд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 12 октября 1653 г. в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности нюбури, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
